relationships: ber:Sami iga laman deg waṭas n yimdanen aydeg ur yelli ara yessefk laman
ber:Yella ccek d ameqqran dakken Sami iga kra n tɣawsa n diri
ber:Tagara, iga Felix assaɣ gar yiferdisen-nni yemgerraden, yeqqel yegza tamsalt
ber:Mi iga yal yiwen ussis, ad naweḍ akk ɣer unfus
ber:Yules iga akk ayen umi yezmer, maca ur yessaweḍ ara
